You are helping me work inside a Developer Brain — a structured knowledge layout.

## Context
- Repo root: `/Users/me/projects/acme`
- Focus file: `src/services/cache.py`
- Related: `tests/unit/test_cache.py`

## Task
Refactor the in-memory cache to use a bounded LRU with a configurable `max_items`.
Keep the public API stable: `get`, `set`, `delete`, and `clear`.

## Constraints
- No new third-party dependencies unless justified in the PR description.
- Preserve type hints and docstrings in the style already used in `cache.py`.

## Example (illustrative only)
```python
from acme.cache import LRUCache

c = LRUCache(max_items=128)
c.set("user:42", {"name": "Ada"})
```

## Notes
- Discuss threat modeling and least privilege when exposing cache metrics on `/health`.
- Do not paste real credentials, tokens, or PEM blocks into this chat.
